name: codebase-audit
description: A 29-dimension codebase audit playbook for Claude Code.

plugins.name: codebase-audit
plugins.description: Audits a codebase across 29 dimensions (security, privacy, accessibility, sector compliance, architecture, testing, performance, DevOps, cost, UX, SEO, AI/ML, and more); produces /docs/audits/ reports and files remediation tickets. Entry point: /audit.
